'''鈭歞h-p-y-p''' ('''kadhapyepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wald|wald]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-p-y-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wald|wald]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-p-y-p
|-
! Lemma
| kadhapyepoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhapyepoko|thidhapyepoko]] || [[word:jidhapyepoko|jidhapyepoko]] || [[word:shidhapyepoko|shidhapyepoko]] || [[word:kidhapyepoko|kidhapyepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhapyepoko|thuthudhapyepoko]] || [[word:jujudhapyepoko|jujudhapyepoko]] || [[word:shushudhapyepoko|shushudhapyepoko]] || [[word:kukudhapyepoko|kukudhapyepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudhapyepoko|thudhapyepoko]] || [[word:judhapyepoko|judhapyepoko]] || [[word:shudhapyepoko|shudhapyepoko]] || [[word:kudhapyepoko|kudhapyepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudhapyepoko|thudhapyepoko]] || [[word:judhapyepoko|judhapyepoko]] || [[word:shudhapyepoko|shudhapyepoko]] || [[word:kudhapyepoko|kudhapyepoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhapyepoko|thodhapyepoko]] || [[word:jodhapyepoko|jodhapyepoko]] || [[word:shodhapyepoko|shodhapyepoko]] || [[word:kodhapyepoko|kodhapyepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhapyepoko|thodhapyepoko]] || [[word:jodhapyepoko|jodhapyepoko]] || [[word:shodhapyepoko|shodhapyepoko]] || [[word:kodhapyepoko|kodhapyepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dhapyepoko|th忙dhapyepoko]] || [[word:j忙dhapyepoko|j忙dhapyepoko]] || [[word:sh忙dhapyepoko|sh忙dhapyepoko]] || [[word:k忙dhapyepoko|k忙dhapyepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadhapyepoko|thathadhapyepoko]] || [[word:jajadhapyepoko|jajadhapyepoko]] || [[word:shashadhapyepoko|shashadhapyepoko]] || [[word:kakadhapyepoko|kakadhapyepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhapyepoko|thadhapyepoko]] || [[word:jadhapyepoko|jadhapyepoko]] || [[word:shadhapyepoko|shadhapyepoko]] || [[word:kadhapyepoko|kadhapyepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhapyepoko|thadhapyepoko]] || [[word:jadhapyepoko|jadhapyepoko]] || [[word:shadhapyepoko|shadhapyepoko]] || [[word:kadhapyepoko|kadhapyepoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shadhapyepithi|shadhapyepithi]] || [[word:shadhapyepiji|shadhapyepiji]] || [[word:shadhapyepishi|shadhapyepishi]] || [[word:shadhapyepiki|shadhapyepiki]]
